description_long: This is a compact, single-story green bungalow with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade features a centered door with a small gable above it, flanked by two symmetrically placed windows with white trim and shutters. The siding is horizontal and painted a muted green, giving the house a classic suburban appearance. The rear and side elevations have additional windows, with the back showing three evenly spaced windows and the sides each having a door and a window arrangement. The roof has a moderate pitch and overhangs the walls, providing some shade and protection. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A green, single-story bungalow with a gray gable roof, white-trimmed windows, and a centered front door beneath a small gable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two symmetrically placed windows with shutters, and a small gable above the door.
description_view_1: Side view with a secondary door, two windows, and a single window in the gable end above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three evenly spaced windows and no doors or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a window in the gable end and two windows below, no door present.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows, evenly spaced side and rear windows
